strategies.EMA_VWAP: Intraday 5-min momentum using EMA(9/21/55) crossover above VWAP with ATR stops
strategies.ORB: Intraday opening range breakout — buys breakout above first-30min high after 10am
strategies.RSI_BOUNCE: Swing trade mean reversion — buys when daily RSI(7) < 25 near lower Bollinger Band
